items.title: External Data Coverage
items.text:
The following substances have been augmented with data from external databases beyond the OPSS source.

  • FDA UNII / GSRS: 605 substances (68.8%) — includes UNII codes, CAS numbers, substance type, and links to FDA GSRS, NCATS Inxight Drugs, CAS Common Chemistry, PubChem, and EPA CompTox.
  • PubChem: 573 substances (65.1%) — includes molecular formula, molecular weight, IUPAC name, InChIKey, and 2D structure image.
  • PubChem 3D Conformer: 527 substances (59.9%) — includes interactive 3D structure viewer.

Use the UNII Data, PubChem Structure, and 3D Conformer tags in search results to filter for substances with these data sources.
